subjects.description: blooming flower beds in a sunrise garden
subjects.appearance_details: roses, lavender, tulips, and mixed blooms in soft pink, purple, yellow, and red, dew beads on petals, varied leaf textures
subjects.relationship: main visual subject filling the garden with color and morning freshness
subjects.location: foreground and middle ground along winding garden paths
subjects.relative_size: small individual flowers forming broad dense beds
subjects.orientation: stems upright, many blossoms angled toward the sunrise
subjects.action: sway lightly as dew glistens and catches the morning light
subjects.state_changes: petals brighten from cool dawn tones to warm sunrise colors
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft petals, velvety rose surfaces, fine lavender stems, glossy dew droplets

subjects.appearance_details: clean pale stone paths with crisp borders, damp morning texture, curves threading through flower beds
subjects.relationship: guides the viewer through the garden composition
subjects.location: lower foreground curving into the middle distance
subjects.relative_size: medium visual pathway through the floral scene
subjects.orientation: curving from lower left toward center background
subjects.action: reflects soft sunrise highlights along damp edges
subjects.state_changes: path surface warms as sunlight spreads across it
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: light stone, fine gravel, damp matte surface

background_setting: neatly maintained garden at sunrise with winding paths, dense flower beds of roses, lavender, tulips, and mixed blooms, early mist and dew across leaves and petals

lighting.conditions: warm sunrise light spreading low across the garden, golden highlights on dew, soft pink sky glow, gentle shadows

aesthetics.composition: vibrant, fresh, delicate, peaceful, botanical beauty

style_medium: photorealistic text to video garden scene
artistic_style: soft cinematic botanical realism with luminous morning color
context: a carefully tended garden wakes at sunrise as flowers, dew, and paths glow in the first warm light

actions.description: close foreground flowers sparkle with dew as the first sunrise light touches their petals
the camera glides along the winding path, revealing roses, lavender, and tulips in layered beds
the garden brightens fully, with warm light spreading over colorful flowers and neat paths
